case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DONNA KWON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AS TO DONNA KWON FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KWON, DONNA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2013
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE DONNA KWON FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
POS; UNABLE TO SERVE TO DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KWON, DONNA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
